sizing_rule.note: Do NOT maintain full optimal f on growing equity base. Reduce position sizing when cumulative drawdown approaches or exceeds 25% of initial capital. The rule warns that full optimal f creates excessive variance on enlarged equity; scaling down mitigates this risk.

source_rule_text: When equity grows, trading at full optimal f on the increased account balance creates excessive variance and drawdown risk, potentially losing more than the initial 25% equity retracement threshold.
